name: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 渐变大理石
nameZh: 鲍伊猎刀（★） | 渐变大理石
descriptionEn: This full-tang sawback Bowie knife is designed for heavy use in brutal survival situations. It has been painted with black and silver metallic paints using a marbleizing medium, then candy coated in three colors. The blade is made of many colors, but soon it all looks red
descriptionZh: 这把全龙骨锯齿的鲍伊猎刀是专为在残酷的生存环境中大量使用而设计的。 这把武器使用黑色和银色的金属涂料画上的仿大理石纹进行了涂装，并且外表裹上了三层颜色的糖衣。 刺刀见虹，刺刀见红
